verses.latin_vulgate: Ephraim pascit ventum,  et sequitur æstum ;  tota die mendacium et vastitatem multiplicat :  et fœdus cum Assyriis iniit,  et oleum in Ægyptum ferebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶפְרַ֜יִם רֹעֶ֥ה ר֙וּחַ֙ וְרֹדֵ֣ף קָדִ֔ים כׇּל־הַיּ֕וֹם כָּזָ֥ב וָשֹׁ֖ד יַרְבֶּ֑ה וּבְרִית֙ עִם־אַשּׁ֣וּר יִכְרֹ֔תוּ וְשֶׁ֖מֶן לְמִצְרַ֥יִם יוּבָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ephraim feedeth on the wind, and followeth the burning heat: all the day long he multiplied lies and desolation: and he hath made a covenant with the Assyrians, and carried oil into Egypt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ephraim ruokkii itsensä tuulella, ja samoo itätuulen perään, ja enentää joka päivä valhetta ja vahinkoa. He tekevät Assurin kanssa liiton, ja vievät öljyä Egyptiin.
verses.king_james: Ephraim feedeth on wind, and followeth after the east wind: he daily increaseth lies and desolation; and they do make a covenant with the Assyrians, and oil is carried into Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Judicium ergo Domini cum Juda,  et visitatio super Jacob :  juxta vias ejus, et juxta adinventiones ejus reddet ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרִ֥יב לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה עִם־יְהוּדָ֑ה וְלִפְקֹ֤ד עַֽל־יַעֲקֹב֙ כִּדְרָכָ֔יו כְּמַעֲלָלָ֖יו יָשִׁ֥יב לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore there is a judgment of the Lord with Juda, and a visitation for Jacob: he will render to him according to his ways, and according to his devices.
verses.finnish_biblia: On myös Herralla riita Juudan kanssa, etsiä Jakobia hänen menonsa jälkeen, ja kostaa hänelle hänen ansionsa jälkeen.
verses.king_james: The Lord hath also a controversy with Judah, and will punish Jacob according to his ways; according to his doings will he recompense him.

verses.latin_vulgate: In utero supplantavit fratrem suum,  et in fortitudine sua directus est cum angelo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּבֶּ֖טֶן עָקַ֣ב אֶת־אָחִ֑יו וּבְאוֹנ֖וֹ שָׂרָ֥ה אֶת־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the womb he supplanted his brother: and by his strength he had success with an angel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on äitinsä kohdussa polkenut alas veljensä, ja kaikella voimallansa Jumalan kanssa taistellut.
verses.king_james: He took his brother by the heel in the womb, and by his strength he had power with God:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et invaluit ad angelum, et confortatus est ;  flevit, et rogavit eum.  In Bethel invenit eum,  et ibi locutus est nobiscum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שַׂר אֶל־מַלְאָךְ֙ וַיֻּכָ֔ל בָּכָ֖ה וַיִּתְחַנֶּן־ל֑וֹ בֵּֽית־אֵל֙ יִמְצָאֶ֔נּוּ וְשָׁ֖ם יְדַבֵּ֥ר עִמָּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he prevailed over the angel, and was strengthened: he wept, and made supplication to him: he found him in Bethel, and there he spoke with us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän paineli myös enkelin kanssa ja voitti; hän itki ja rukoili häntä; Betelissä löysi hän hänen, ja siellä hän on puhunut meidän kanssamme.
verses.king_james: Yea, he had power over the angel, and prevailed: he wept, and made supplication unto him: he found him in Beth–el, and there he spake with us;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Dominus Deus exercituum,  Dominus memoriale ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: Even the Lord God of hosts, the Lord is his memorial.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta se Herra on Jumala Zebaot, Herra on hänen muistonimensä.
verses.king_james: Even the Lord God of hosts; the Lord is his memorial.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu ad Deum tuum converteris ;  misericordiam et judicium custodi,  et spera in Deo tuo semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֖ה בֵּאלֹהֶ֣יךָ תָשׁ֑וּב חֶ֤סֶד וּמִשְׁפָּט֙ שְׁמֹ֔ר וְקַוֵּ֥ה אֶל־אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ תָּמִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore turn thou to thy God: keep mercy and judgment, and hope in thy God always.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin käänny nyt sinun Jumalas tykö; tee laupius ja oikeus, ja turvaa alati sinun Jumalaas.
verses.king_james: Therefore turn thou to thy God: keep mercy and judgment, and wait on thy God continually.

verses.latin_vulgate: Chanaan, in manu ejus statera dolosa,  calumniam dilexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּנַ֗עַן בְּיָד֛וֹ מֹאזְנֵ֥י מִרְמָ֖ה לַעֲשֹׁ֥ק אָהֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He is like Chanaan, there is a deceitful balance in his hand, he hath loved oppression.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kauppamiehellä on väärä vaaka kädessä, ja pettää mielellänsä.
verses.king_james: He is a merchant, the balances of deceit are in his hand: he loveth to oppress.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Ephraim : Verumtamen dives effectus sum ;  inveni idolum mihi :  omnes labores mei non invenient mihi iniquitatem quam peccavi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אֶפְרַ֔יִם אַ֣ךְ עָשַׁ֔רְתִּי מָצָ֥אתִי א֖וֹן לִ֑י כׇּל־יְגִיעַ֕י לֹ֥א יִמְצְאוּ־לִ֖י עָוֺ֥ן אֲשֶׁר־חֵֽטְא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Ephraim said: But yet I am become rich, I have found me an idol: all my labours shall not find me the iniquity that I have committed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ephraim sanoo: Minä olen rikas, minulla on kyllä; ei yhdessäkään minun työssäni löydetä pahatekoa, joka synti olis.
verses.king_james: And Ephraim said, Yet I am become rich, I have found me out substance: in all my labours they shall find none iniquity in me that were sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ego Dominus Deus tuus ex terra Ægypti :  adhuc sedere te faciam in tabernaculis, sicut in diebus festivitatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֛י יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרָ֑יִם עֹ֛ד אוֹשִֽׁיבְךָ֥ בׇאֳהָלִ֖ים כִּימֵ֥י מוֹעֵֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I that am the Lord thy God from the land of Egypt, will yet cause thee to dwell in tabernacles, as in the days of the feast.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä olen Herra sinun Jumalas hamasta Egyptin maasta; minä annan sinun vielä majoissa asua, niinkuin juhlina tapahtuu.
verses.king_james: And I that am the Lord thy God from the land of Egypt will yet make thee to dwell in tabernacles, as in the days of the solemn feast.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et locutus sum super prophetas,  et ego visionem multiplicavi,  et in manu prophetarum assimilatus sum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדִבַּ֙רְתִּי֙ עַל־הַנְּבִיאִ֔ים וְאָנֹכִ֖י חָז֣וֹן הִרְבֵּ֑יתִי וּבְיַ֥ד הַנְּבִיאִ֖ים אֲדַמֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I have spoken by the prophets, and I have multiplied visions, and I have used similitudes by the ministry of the prophets.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhun prophetaille, olen myös se, joka niin monet ennustukset annan, ja prophetain kautta minuni julistan.
verses.king_james: I have also spoken by the prophets, and I have multiplied visions, and used similitudes, by the ministry of the prophets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si Galaad idolum, ergo frustra erant in Galgal bobus immolantes ;  nam et altaria eorum quasi acervi super sulcos agri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־גִּלְעָ֥ד אָ֙וֶן֙ אַךְ־שָׁ֣וְא הָי֔וּ בַּגִּלְגָּ֖ל שְׁוָרִ֣ים זִבֵּ֑חוּ גַּ֤ם מִזְבְּחוֹתָם֙ כְּגַלִּ֔ים עַ֖ל תַּלְמֵ֥י שָׂדָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: If Galaad be an idol, then in vain were they in Galgal offering sacrifices with bullocks: for their altars also are as heaps in the furrows of the field.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Gileadissa on epäjumalan palvelus, ja Gilgalissa he uhraavat härkiä hukkaan, ja heillä on niin monta alttaria, kuin kuhilaita on pellolla.
verses.king_james: Is there iniquity in Gilead? surely they are vanity: they sacrifice bullocks in Gilgal; yea, their altars are as heaps in the furrows of the fields.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fugit Jacob in regionem Syriæ,  et servivit Israël in uxorem,  et in uxorem servavit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְרַ֥ח יַעֲקֹ֖ב שְׂדֵ֣ה אֲרָ֑ם וַיַּעֲבֹ֤ד יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ בְּאִשָּׁ֔ה וּבְאִשָּׁ֖ה שָׁמָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Jacob fled into the country of Syria, and Israel served for a wife, and was a keeper for a wife.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jakobin täytyy Syrian maahan paeta, ja Israelin täytyy palvella vaimon tähden; vaimon tähden tosin täytyy hänen karjaa kaita.
verses.king_james: And Jacob fled into the country of Syria, and Israel served for a wife, and for a wife he kept sheep.

verses.latin_vulgate: In propheta autem eduxit Dominus Israël de Ægypto,  et in propheta servatus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנָבִ֕יא הֶעֱלָ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם וּבְנָבִ֖יא נִשְׁמָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the Lord by a prophet brought Israel out of Egypt: and he was preserved by a prophet.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sitte vei Herra Israelin Egyptistä prophetan kautta, ja antoi prophetan kautta häntä korjata.
verses.king_james: And by a prophet the Lord brought Israel out of Egypt, and by a prophet was he preserved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad iracundiam me provocavit Ephraim in amaritudinibus suis :  et sanguis ejus super eum veniet,  et opprobrium ejus restituet ei Dominus suus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִכְעִ֥יס אֶפְרַ֖יִם תַּמְרוּרִ֑ים וְדָמָיו֙ עָלָ֣יו יִטּ֔וֹשׁ וְחֶ֨רְפָּת֔וֹ יָשִׁ֥יב ל֖וֹ אֲדֹנָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Ephraim hath provoked me to wrath with his bitterness, and his blood shall come upon him, and his Lord will render his reproach unto him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Ephraim vihoittaa hänen nyt epäjumalillansa; sentähden pitää heidän verensä tuleman heidän päällensä, ja heidän Herransa on kostava heidän pilkkansa.
verses.king_james: Ephraim provoked him to anger most bitterly: therefore shall he leave his blood upon him, and his reproach shall his Lord return unto him.
